title: Pet Prime Automatic Ball Launcher for Large Dog, Rechargeable Cordless Interactive Ball Thrower Toy with Random Distance, Fetch Machine with 6 Durable 2.5" E-TPU Balls & Dog Whistle
features: 【Random Fun】 Three distance settings: 20m, 10m, or random 3-20m for unpredictable excitement, keeping play engaging.
【Easy-Clean Balls】 ETPU balls resist dirt and saliva; simple wipe-clean design avoids messes like absorbent tennis balls.
【Dual Power Modes】 Ball thrower dog toy use wirelessly on full charge or plugged in with adapter for flexible, continuous playtime
【Hands-Free Play】 Automatic ball launcher for dogs automatically launches balls, freeing you to relax while your dog enjoys independent fun.
【Boredom Relief】Dog ball thrower stimulates dogs with active play, reducing restlessness and promoting healthy exercise.
【Simple Operation】 One-button distance selection; insert a ball and it auto-launches in 5 seconds for effortless use.
Note: Only load 1 ball at a time – auto-launches after 5 seconds. Max distance may vary with battery level/terrain. Large dog thrower launcher using non-standard balls may cause jams.
